case_title: JOSEPH IMBELLONI VS. ASTRACHAN & DUNBAR ARCHITECTS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT ASTRACHAN & DUNBAR ARCHITECTS, INC. OQO, INC. DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OQO, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2394 FOLSOM STREET; 2398 FOLSOM STREET; 583 SHOTWELL ST.& 3320-3330 20TH ST. S.F. CA.94110, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OQO, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT ASTRACHAN & DUNBAR ARCHITECTS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH SERVED APR-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OQO, INC.
DECLARATION RE MULTIPLE ADDRESS FOR PREMISES FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT OQO, INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT OQO, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT OQO, INC.
